title: Ubiquiti UCG-Industrial, UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial
description: The Ubiquiti Cloud Gateway Industrial is an industrial UniFi dual-band Wi-Fi 7 router operating simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands to achieve a total throughput of up to 4.99Gbps . It is further equipped with (1) SFP+ slot, (1) 10G port, (4) 2.5G ports, (1) microSD slot for camera recording (preinstalled 128GB card) and (2) SIM slots for use with U5G-Max-Outdoor (1) SFP+ slot, (1) 10Gbps port, (4) 2.5Gbps ports, dual-band 4-stream Wi-Fi 7 Total throughput up to 4.99Gbps - 688Mbps on 2,4GHz (2x2) and 4.3Gbps on 5GHz (2x2) Multi-WAN with load balancing and failover support IDS/IPS throughput up to 5Gbps VPN support, including site-to-site VPN Supports UniFi Network, Protect, Access, Talk and Connect applications, managing over 50 UniFi devices and more than 500 clients Power via 54V DC connector or 48V 4-pin connector PoE with total power budget 270W Ports 1-2 support 802.3af/at PoE+ with power output of up to 30W/port Ports 3-5 support 802.3af/at/bt PoE+++ with power output of up to 90W/port Ports 1-2 support 802.3af/at PoE+ with power output of up to 30W/port Ports 3-5 support 802.3af/at/bt PoE+++ with power output of up to 90W/port Device Mounting bracket Stand Mounting accessories Power adapter 54V 350W Adapter holder (2) Antennas (2) Antenna blanking plates
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 4096 QAM Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band), Bluetooth WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4300 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 5, 6 Connectors and Interfaces Multiple WAN Yes Slot for Memory Card microSD LAN speed (1) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10G + (4) 100M/1G/2.5G Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps SIM slots quantity 2 Power Power type DC connector, 4-pin automotive PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE Out ports 5 Max. power consumption [W] 28 Power via connector/terminal 48V DC, 54V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop, Rackmount, Industry Fans No Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 50 Weight [g] 2400 Width [mm] 308 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 204 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex-A73 CPU frequency [MHz] 2200 CPU cores 4 RAM [MB] 3072
